title: The Crew Reaches the Floating Restaurant Baratie
description: On pages 5–8, the crew reaches the floating restaurant Baratie, where Luffy’s impulsiveness, Fullbody’s arrogance, and Sanji’s sharp code collide.
scene: The Baratie is loud, violent, and rule-bound: cooks fight like pirates, customers cause trouble, and Sanji’s character begins to emerge through conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wait a minute, I think I've seen you two before.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You frequent the government offices on some business.

dialogue.speaker: Fullbody
dialogue.text: If I remember correctly, you're... small time bounty hunters.

dialogue.speaker: Yosaku
dialogue.text: Yosaku and Johnny, I think your names were...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So you've finally been caught by pirates, have you?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey, yosaku, I think this bro's sticking it to us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "Well, we can't just let some guy walk around, calling us "small time."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This ain't gonna net us a single bell, but I think we oughta teach this kid how to keep his mouth shut.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You cocky little yuppie!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: A-Almost had him...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You sure you guys aren't super weak?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: N-No, it's just that that that guy's not too shabby himself.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I-it was a close one...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The hell are you two doing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Darling, enough beating up on weaklings, let's get going already.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah yes, let's do that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Consider yourselves lucky pirates because I'm on break today.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I only came here to eat at the restaurant.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But consider your lives forfeit the next time you run into me when I'm not off-duty.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What's all this, Johnny?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh that?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Those're just the bounty posters, sister.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's just another type of business. Kill any one of them and you'll get the bounty reward written in the posters.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Grumple

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Is something the matter?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: guys, we're in deep shit! <

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ah!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The bastard's aiming his cannon at us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sink'em.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He fired!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffyy, what're you doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Leave it to me!

summary: This part introduces the Baratie as more than a restaurant; it is a battlefield of pride, hunger, and harsh principles that will define Sanji’s arc.
